title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates six "power phrases" to type into Claude Code that allegedly improve project velocity. He claims these techniques, endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, enable 10x faster building and represent a methodology distinct from prompt quality, model choice, or plugins alone.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six "power phrases" to type into Claude Code, presenting them as a methodology for faster project velocity that is separate from prompt quality, model choice, or plugins. The framing positions these phrases as techniques endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, with a claimed result of 10x faster building. The relevance for an AI-assisted development workflow is the focus on specific reusable inputs rather than general prompt tuning or tooling changes.
